contributor_summaries.spouliot: Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget to all platforms

preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 carried the Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (#3096); the import for apps with a base path; Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp; Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget to all platforms; Move the Blazor workaround into WASM; `<WindowsSdkPackageVersion>` to set the SDK version; .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues; freetype2 to 2.13.3+; libexpat to v2.6.4; libjpeg_turbo to the latest….
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried harfbuzz to 8.3.1; skia to Milestone 118; skia to milestone 117.
